channel.title: Star Trek Relaunch Book Club on Trek Relaunch Book Club
channel.description: Recent content in Star Trek Relaunch Book Club on Trek Relaunch Book Club

item.title: TNG: Death In Winter
item.description: DNA thieves, Beverly Crusher’s maiden name and a few guest appearances from the USS Stargazer. Can author Michael Jan Friedman maneuver the Star Trek TNG books into this new era? History. Before writing Death In Winter, author Michael Jan Friedman had just wrapped up his 6th Stargazer book, a spinoff book series focusing on a young Jean Luc Picard onboard his previous ship, the Stargazer. Given his extensive work with a young Picard (as well as a dozen or so previous TNG books), Friedman must have seemed like a safe pair of hands to kick off the “relaunch” book phase.

item.title: Titan: Taking Wing
item.description: This book is next up to be read.
